message:
✨ feat: Kubara UX — Mission Explorer CTA + Phase 2/3 badges (#8483, #8484) (#8543)

Add "Use in Mission Control" button on Kubara chart previews in
MissionBrowser that pre-populates Phase 1 with the selected chart.

Show "Kubara" badge on project nodes in ClusterAssignmentPanel (Phase 2)
and FlightPlanBlueprint (Phase 3) when a project has kubaraChart set.

- Add kubaraChart field to PayloadProject type
- Add i18n keys for badge text and tooltip
- Wire MissionBrowser → MissionSidebar → MissionControlDialog flow

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

+      "expandToFullScreen": "Expand to full screen",
